title: Small-defect hardening batch (7 verified nits, one cycle): consensusdispatch -1 exit mapping, advisor capture write errors, fleet Gosched pseudo-sync, run_id wire pin, ship-regex relative-path pin, marketplacepoll/rollback ctx timeouts, staticcheck SA1012 nil Context
summary: (1) consensusdispatch.go:190,221: `_ = cmd.Run()`; signal-killed child → ProcessState.ExitCode()==-1 leaks upward as neither OK/FAIL/RuntimeErr. (2) core/phase_advisor.go:358-369: three `_ = p.writeArtifact(...)` — span SHA can reference files that failed to write (WS3-S2 binding silently diverges). (3) fleet/pool.go:105-109: runtime.Gosched() documented as ordering guarantee — only true at GOMAXPROCS=1; remove + fix comment (correctness already rests on the completions channel). (4) cyclestate state_test wire pin omits "run_id" (CA.5 correlation tag) — a camelCase tag rename would pass tests and break fleet/ledger correlation. (5) guards/ship.go:30 nativeShipRe allows path-separator-anchored '../evolve ship' — policy unpinned by any test; decide and pin. (6) marketplacepoll.go:116-117 git fetch/reset + rollback.go:323-326 gh calls via bare exec.Command with no ctx — one hung network call blocks the release pipeline forever; route through sysexec.RunFunc with deadline from remaining MaxWait. (7) staticcheck SA1012: internal/log/events.go:162 passes nil Context.
root_cause: Accumulated small deviations from the project's own idioms (sysexec for subprocesses, fail-loud writes, wire-pin tests, no pseudo-sync).
fix: Mechanical per-item fixes as summarized; each with its twin test where behavior is pinned (exit-code mapping table test, recording-writer WARN test, GOMAXPROCS>1 pool property test, run_id added to the wire-assertion set, ship-regex relative-path table rows, blocking-RunFunc deadline tests, context.TODO at events.go:162).
acceptance: Each of the 7 items lands with a test naming its contract; no unrelated refactors ride along
go vet + staticcheck clean on touched packages (SA1012 resolved)
go test -race green across consensusdispatch, core, fleet, cyclestate, guards, marketplacepoll, rollback, log
